notableEvents.label: Nolan Arenado plunked
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Arenado hit by pitch. Corbin Carroll to 3rd. Geraldo Perdomo to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Ildemaro Vargas GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ildemaro Vargas grounds into a double play, second baseman Chad Stevens to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman Willi Castro. Nolan Arenado out at 2nd. Ildemaro Vargas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ildemaro Vargas rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ildemaro Vargas grounds into a double play, second baseman Chad Stevens to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman Willi Castro. Nolan Arenado out at 2nd. Ildemaro Vargas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Geraldo Perdomo steals (8) 2nd base. Geraldo Perdomo to 3rd. Geraldo Perdomo advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Hunter Goodman.

notableEvents.label: Jose Fernandez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jose Fernandez out on a sacrifice bunt, pitcher Juan Mejia to second baseman Willi Castro. Gabriel Moreno to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Corbin Carroll walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Corbin Carroll singles on a ground ball to right fielder Tyler Freeman. Gabriel Moreno scores. Ketel Marte to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman grounds into a double play, second baseman Ketel Marte to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. Willi Castro out at 2nd. Tyler Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Hunter Goodman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Hunter Goodman grounds into a double play, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. Tyler Freeman out at 2nd. Hunter Goodman out at 1st.
